name: Next-generation discovery: empowering organoid research with
snippet: Image-based readouts remain foundational: snapshot microscopy (confocal and wide field) captures morphology and, together with staining, detects a limited panel of proteins under steady-state conditions, whereas live cell imaging yields rich time series.
